name: humanspec_APOBEC3_cluster_orangutan
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: APOBEC3_cluster. Status in Pongo abelii: 'ape_lineage_expansion'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr22:~39.3 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr22. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for APOBEC3_cluster. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. APOBEC3_cluster)
